0=No impairment
1=Impairment on one side
2=Impairment on both sides effective 10/01/2023
886 LMTN_LWR_XTRMTY_CD LMTN_LWR_XTRMTY_CD GG0115B Functional limits - Lower extremity CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had lower extremity (hip, knee, ankle, foot) limitations that interfered with daily functions or placed them at risk of injury in the last seven days. 0=No impairment
1=Impairment on one side
2=Impairment on both sides effective 10/01/2023
